title: oldenlandia consanguinea
intro: Oldenlandia consanguinea, also known as the Chinese ephedra or red stemmed oldenlandia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Oldenlandia consanguinea include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and treat conditions such as diabetes and respiratory issues. Oldenlandia consanguinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
